name: movie-recommender
description: Movie recommendation system — ChromaDB + Express + React (equal weight for age, likes and genre)

scripts.start: docker compose up -d && sleep 5 && npm run seed --prefix backend && npm run dev
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n back,front -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.stop: kill $(lsof -ti:5173) 2>/dev/null; kill $(lsof -ti:3001) 2>/dev/null; docker compose down; echo '✓ All stopped (frontend + backend + docker)'
